Before editing, I'll re-read current file state to merge cleanly rather than overwrite. Sound good?

Please wait for my DONE message, then re-read both files fresh and append IsPhoneNumber after my changes (not overwrite). This avoids clobbering via sequencing instead of file-level disjointness.
